item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer brakes the requested N+1 reminder immediately, frames the prior fixes as repeated local overlays, moves the owner upstream to submission acceptance/self-check mechanisms, and proposes a consolidated structural gate covering time, attachments, format, and citation completeness.
